posts.title: Chinese women are going to Saipan, Mariana Islands to give birth.  Thanks to the Supreme Court their children are US citizens even though they will be raised in China and indoctrinated with communism.

quotedTweet.content:
This Chinese national traveled to the Northern Mariana Islands to give birth so her child would automatically become a U.S. citizen.

She overstayed her visa and was still approved.

SCOTUS got it wrong. Congress needs to close these loopholes now!

twitter.content:
At its peak, 70%+ (!!) of births in Saipan—a U.S. territory—were to Chinese nationals via birth tourism.

Kids got automatic U.S. citizenship.

Thousands of such "Americans" have been born there since 2009.

Congress needs to close this loophole ASAP!
